ConceptMap.group[0].source (l1/c64610)informationSource Code System http://snomed.info/sct is only supported on the terminology server, so the source codes are not validated for performance reasons

ConceptMap (l1/c64612)warningPublished concept maps SHOULD conform to the ShareableConceptMap profile, which says that the element ConceptMap.experimental is mandatory, but it is not present

SM_DEPENDENT_PARAM_TYPE_MISMATCH

input/maps/BundleVSToAddBundle.fmlThe parameter 'ddcc' refers to the variable 'source http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Bundle#Bundle.entry ddcc' but it's type is 'DDCCVS' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'CoreDataSetVSToAddBundle', which is 'DDCCVS' (from map 'http://smart.who.int/ddcc/StructureMap/CoreDataSetVSToAddBundle|1.0.0')
input/maps/CertDCCtoDDCC.fmlThe parameter 'protocol' refers to the variable 'target BackboneElement protocolApplied' but it's type is 'ProtocolApplied' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'ExtractProtocolApplied', which is 'ProtocolApplied' (from map '$this')
input/maps/CertDCCtoDDCC.fmlThe parameter 'tgt' refers to the variable 'target Patient patient' but it's type is 'DDCCPatient' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'ExtractPersonName', which is 'DDCCPatient' (from map '$this')
input/maps/CertDIVOCtoDDCC.fmlThe parameter 'ev' refers to the variable 'source http://smart.who.int/ddcc/StructureDefinition/CertDIVOC#CertDIVOC.evidence ev' but it's type is 'Evidence' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'ExtractVaccine', which is 'Evidence' (from map '$this')
input/maps/CertDIVOCtoDDCC.fmlThe parameter 'src' refers to the variable 'source http://smart.who.int/ddcc/StructureDefinition/CertDIVOC#CertDIVOC.credentialSubject credentialSubject' but it's type is 'CredentialSubject' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'ExtractPatientFromSubj', which is 'CredentialSubject' (from map '$this')
input/maps/CertDIVOCtoDDCC.fmlThe parameter 'fhirAddress' refers to the variable 'target Address fhirAddress' but it's type is 'Address' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'ExtractAddress', which is 'Address' (from map '$this')
input/maps/CertDIVOCtoDDCC.fmlThe parameter 'location' refers to the variable 'target Location location' but it's type is 'Address' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'ExtractLocation', which is 'Address' (from map '$this')
input/maps/CertDIVOCtoDDCC.fmlThe parameter 'protocol' refers to the variable 'target BackboneElement protocolApplied' but it's type is 'ProtocolApplied' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'ExtractProtocolApplied', which is 'ProtocolApplied' (from map '$this')
input/maps/CertICAOtoDDCC.fmlThe parameter 'src' refers to the variable 'source http://smart.who.int/ddcc/StructureDefinition/CertICAO#CertICAO.data data' but it's type is 'Data' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'ExtractData', which is 'Data' (from map '$this')
input/maps/CertICAOtoDDCC.fmlThe parameter 'patient' refers to the variable 'target Patient patient' but it's type is 'Patient' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'ExtractPatientFromMsg', which is 'Patient' (from map '$this')
input/maps/CertICAOtoDDCC.fmlThe parameter 'protocol' refers to the variable 'target BackboneElement protocolApplied' but it's type is 'ProtocolApplied' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'ExtractProtocolApplied', which is 'ProtocolApplied' (from map '$this')
input/maps/CertSHCtoCoreDataSet.fmlThe parameter 'patient' refers to the variable 'source Patient patient' but it's type is 'SHCPatientDM' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'PatientToDDCCVS', which is 'SHCPatientDM' (from map 'http://smart.who.int/ddcc/StructureMap/SHCToCoreDataSetVS|1.0.0')
input/maps/CertSHCtoCoreDataSet.fmlThe parameter 'immunization' refers to the variable 'source Immunization immunization' but it's type is 'SHCImmunizationDM' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'ImmunizationToDDCC', which is 'SHCImmunizationDM' (from map 'http://smart.who.int/ddcc/StructureMap/SHCToCoreDataSetVS|1.0.0')
input/maps/CertSHCtoCoreDataSet.fmlThe parameter 'patient' refers to the variable 'source Patient patient' but it's type is 'SHCPatientDM' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'PatientToDDCCTR', which is 'SHCPatientDM' (from map 'http://smart.who.int/ddcc/StructureMap/SHCToCoreDataSetTR|1.0.0')
input/maps/CertSHCtoCoreDataSet.fmlThe parameter 'lab' refers to the variable 'source Observation lab' but it's type is 'SHCLabDM' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'LabToDDCC', which is 'SHCLabDM' (from map 'http://smart.who.int/ddcc/StructureMap/SHCToCoreDataSetTR|1.0.0')
input/maps/CertSHCtoDDCC.fmlThe parameter 'src' refers to the variable 'source CertSHC src' but it's type is 'Data' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'ExtractComposition', which is 'Data' (from map '$this')
input/maps/CoreDataSetVSLibrary.fmlThe parameter 'comp' refers to the variable 'target Composition comp' but it's type is 'DDCCComposition' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'DDCCToComposition', which is 'DDCCComposition' (from map 'http://smart.who.int/ddcc/StructureMap/CoreDataSetLibrary|1.0.0')

SM_DEPENDENT_PARAM_TYPE_MISMATCH_DUPLICATE

input/maps/CertDCCtoCoreDataSet.fmlThe group DCCtoCoreDataSet has already been used with different parameters, so the type checking may be incorrect (other = [source null dcc, target DDCCCoreDataSet ddcc]; this = [source null dcc, target DDCCCoreDataSet ddcc])
input/maps/CertDCCtoCoreDataSet.fmlThe group CertDCCtoCoreDataSetCertificate has already been used with different parameters, so the type checking may be incorrect (other = [source null src, source null dcc, source null g, target BackboneElement certificate]; this = [source null src, source null dcc, source null g, target BackboneElement certificate])
input/maps/CertDIVOCtoCoreDataSet.fmlThe group CredentialSubjecttoCoreDataSet has already been used with different parameters, so the type checking may be incorrect (other = [source http://smart.who.int/ddcc/StructureDefinition/CertDIVOC#CertDIVOC.credentialSubject credentialSubject, target DDCCCoreDataSet ddcc]; this = [source http://smart.who.int/ddcc/StructureDefinition/CertDIVOC#CertDIVOC.credentialSubject credentialSubject, target DDCCCoreDataSet ddcc])
input/maps/CertDIVOCtoCoreDataSet.fmlThe group CertDIVOCtoCoreDataSetCertificate has already been used with different parameters, so the type checking may be incorrect (other = [source CertDIVOC src, source http://smart.who.int/ddcc/StructureDefinition/CertDIVOC#CertDIVOC.evidence evidence, target BackboneElement certificate]; this = [source CertDIVOC src, source http://smart.who.int/ddcc/StructureDefinition/CertDIVOC#CertDIVOC.evidence evidence, target BackboneElement certificate])

input/maps/CertICAOtoCoreDataSet.fmlThe group ExtractPatient has already been used with different parameters, so the type checking may be incorrect (other = [source null pid, target DDCCCoreDataSet ddcc]; this = [source null pid, target DDCCCoreDataSet ddcc])

fsh-generated/resources/ValueSet-VaccineCovid19SnomedValueSet.jsonThis SNOMED-CT based include has some concepts with semantic tags (FSN terms) and some without (preferred terms) - check that this is what is intended (examples for FSN: [vacuna COVID-19 virus entero inactivado 1 dosis/0,5 ml, suspensiÃ³n inyectable, vial de 0,5 ml (1 dosis), vacuna COVID-19 vector no replicante adenovirus de chimpancÃ© 1 dosis/0,5 ml, soluciÃ³n inyectable, vial de 5 ml (10 dosis), vacuna COVID-19 vector no replicante Adenovirus humano 5 1 dosis/0,5 ml, soluciÃ³n inyectable, vial de 3 ml (5 dosis), vacuna COVID-19 vector no replicante Adenovirus humano 26 1 dosis/0,5 ml, soluciÃ³n inyectable, vial de 3 ml (5 dosis), vacuna COVID-19 vector no replicante Adenovirus humano 26 1 dosis/0,5 ml, suspensiÃ³n inyectable, vial de 3 ml (5 dosis)] and examples for no FSN: [COVID-19 mRNA vaccine (BNT162b2) of Pfizer-BioNTech, COVID-19 mRNA vaccine (mRNA-1273) of Moderna, COVID-19 viral vector vaccine (AZD1222 (ChAdOx1-S recombinant)) of AstraZeneca, Oxford, COVID-19 viral vector vaccine (JNJ-78436735( Ad26.COV2-S recombinant)) of Johnson and Johnson, Janssens, COVID-19 mRNA Vaccine Pfizer-BioNTech 10 micrograms/dose concentrate for dispersion for injection])
